full_text:
Chen Fan (Zhongju) 陳蕃 (仲舉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Fan (陳蕃), styledZhongju (仲舉). Served Emperor Ling of Han as Imperial Guardian. Died opposing the eunuchs. Chen Fan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Chen Fan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
